title: Last Seen Message
description: Ever wondered the last time you have played Minecraft together?  Now you can get messages telling you that exact thing! (for 1.20 -> 1.21.11)
body:
# Last Seen Message
Receive messages when someone joins a server that tells you the last time you have played together.

## Video showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1XiGTHkyjPg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
(I joined the dev server in a production enviroment)

## Messages
- When someone is seen on the same server as you for the first time.
- When someone is seen on the same server as you again.
- When you join a server for the first time.
- When you join a server again.

## Features
- In game config editor using Mod Menu and YACL.
- A custom placeholder system.
- A custom formatting system.
- Very customizable configuration..
- Saving the last time you've seen a player when either you or they leave.
